plugin.name: wayfire-default-focus
plugin._long: Hand keyboard focus to a designated layer-shell surface (identified by its namespace) whenever no toplevel view has focus. Lets a BOTTOM-layer desktop shell receive keystrokes after the last app window closes.

option.name: namespace
option._long: wlr_layer_surface_v1::namespace of the surface that should receive keyboard focus when no toplevel is focused. Matches GtkLayerShell.set_namespace() on the client side.
